title: VDE Annual Salary Aggregates by Year and Grade, 2010–2023 (Derived)
description: Per-year and per-(year, grade) aggregate statistics — count, min, p25, median, mean, p75, max, stdev, sum — for annual_rate and actual_paid of Massachusetts DDS-Det Vocational Disability Examiners (CTHRU title LIKE '%DISAB EXAMINER%', MRC). Includes a by_year_and_grade breakdown and headline findings. Derived from vde-annual-salary-by-employee.csv via the (excluded) _build_vde_pay.py. Pre-2010 CTHRU data unavailable; 2023 actual_paid incomplete. Massachusetts public-record payroll.

columns.name: grade
columns.description: Pay grade (key under by_year_and_grade; absent in by_year).

columns.name: n
columns.description: Number of employee-year records in the aggregate.

columns.name: annual_rate.median
columns.description: Median annual_rate (the annual_rate stat block also has min/p25/mean/p75/max/stdev/sum).

columns.name: overtime_paid_among_payers.n
columns.description: Count of employees with any overtime.

notes: Large file (~286 KB). Derived from vde-annual-salary-by-employee.csv (deduped to latest snapshot per year/employee). Top-level keys include $comment, source, grade_legend, outlier_methodology, year_data_completeness, by_year, by_year_and_grade, headline_findings, and a !!_DATA_GAP_2001_2009 block. 2023 actual_paid flagged INCOMPLETE. Column names use dot-paths to denote nested stat fields.
